AI Engineering

Intelligent Software Built for Storytellers

Designing and deploying production-grade AI systems, vector search models, and real-time visualization dashboards.

01 / Movie Discovery Platform

Watchin.app

Live App

Watchin.app is a personalized, AI-driven cinema curation and recommendation platform. Moving beyond traditional genre labels, it utilizes vector search to index screenplays and film metadata, matching users based on specific moods, aesthetic vibes, and structural pacing.

  • Vibe-Based Semantic Search: Allows query parsing (e.g., "existential neon noir set in Tokyo with low dialog") mapped via text embeddings.
  • Style-Vector Matching: Calculates compatibility matching indexes based on 12 cinematic dimensions including tension, tone, and visual pace.
Python Gemini API Firestore Vector Search React Nginx
Visit watchin.app
02 / Narrative Analytics Tool

Narratiq.app

Internal Alpha

Narratiq.app is an advanced AI screenplay structure analyzer and co-pilot for directors, editors, and producers. The tool parses screenplays in standard formats to automatically map structural beats, emotional arcs, and character relationships in an interactive dashboard.

  • Pacing Index Graph: Visualizes real-time narrative tension, dialogue ratios, and scene-level progression vectors.
  • Character Network Graph: Builds dynamic interaction networks, mapping strength and frequency of scene interactions between characters.
  • Emotional Arc Tracking: Employs sentiment modeling to identify emotional shifts per act, keeping script beats aligned with structural templates.
Python (FastAPI) Claude / Gemini Live D3.js Charts NetworkX PostgreSQL
Visit narratiq.app
